response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and his current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which is directionally relevant. However, the role is a Director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, a track record of advising strategic customers and shaping cloud product strategy at scale, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field — none of which the resume substantiates. His AI exposure is nascent (began April 2025), his career arc is that of a senior/staff hands-on engineer rather than a technical strategist, and there is no evidence of executive-level advisory work or AI-driven product recognition externally.
strengths: Approximately 20 years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating active builder fluency in agentic AI workflows
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and community educator (workshops, conference talks) showing ability to inspire and share technical knowledge
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; highest credential is a BS in Computer Science paired with a BA in Fine Arts, with no AI research background
AI and cloud expertise is shallow and very recent — meaningful AI work begins only in April 2025, which is insufficient depth for a strategic advisory role at Director level
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers, shaping cloud or AI product strategy at organizational scale, or operating as a recognized external AI expert

key_factors.factor: Strategic and executive advisory track record
Years and breadth of engineering experience
